data.title: Senior Security Analyst
data.description: Lead critical infrastructure protection assessments with TS/SCI clearance. Mentor junior analysts and coordinate with mission partners on defensive posture improvements.
data.snippet: TS/SCI + sponsor-ready role focused on critical infrastructure protection.

data.title: Mission Systems Software Engineer
data.description: Develop avionics mission software for fifth-generation airframes. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver flight-certified capabilities with strict security controls.
data.snippet: Secret clearance and C++/ADA stack on next-gen fighter platforms.

data.title: OCONUS Program Manager — Integrated Defense
data.description: Oversee international defense portfolio delivery with multinational stakeholders. Own contract execution, risk management, and in-country partner coordination.
data.snippet: International assignment with rotational travel and premium allowances.

data.title: Remote DoD Systems Administrator
data.description: Maintain distributed DoD network enclaves with zero trust tooling. Schedule patch cycles, respond to HBSS events, and support accreditation packages.
data.snippet: Remote-friendly role with Security+ and ITIL bonus.

data.title: Intelligence Analyst
data.description: Support intelligence operations with analysis and reporting. TS/SCI with poly required. Work with cutting-edge tools and collaborate with interagency partners.
data.snippet: Analytical role supporting national security missions.

data.title: Senior Security Analyst
data.description: Lead critical infrastructure protection assessments with TS/SCI clearance. Mentor junior analysts and coordinate with mission partners on defensive posture improvements. Drive proactive hunt missions with DHS and interagency stakeholders. Design detection analytics and validation plans for emerging threats. Deliver executive-ready briefings with mission-aligned recommendations.
data.snippet: TS/SCI + sponsor-ready role focused on critical infrastructure protection.
requirements: Prior DHS or DoD hunt support
responsibilities: Drive proactive hunt missions with DHS and interagency stakeholders
Design detection analytics and validation plans for emerging threats
Deliver executive-ready briefings with mission-aligned recommendations
